title: Read/Write Without Port Definition
body:
---


Author Name: **Dan Snyder**
Original Redmine Issue: 254 from https://www.veripool.org
Original Date: 2010-05-24


---

I'm designing a MIPS1 processor and I would like to be able to read/assert wire values for testing.  Is there any way to access all module definitions of all modules in the project (i/o/io,wires,regs) through my C++ testbench assuming the structure of my design is to have a parent module with all submodules instantiated within?
